calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-21-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: JUDGE PRO TEM MARY MCLAIN; CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (525)

9:30 AM CAUSE CALLED ON REGULAR TRIAL DE NOVO.
RESPONDENT LOLA WHITTLE APPEARED IN PRO PER. NEELE ROY APPEARED IN PRO PER APPEARED AS A WITNESS FOR RESPONDENT, AND TESTIFY IN NARRATIVE. APPELLANT BIVET BRACKETT APPEARED IN PRO PER. AMPARO BRACKETT APPEARED AS WITNESS FOR APPELLANT. BOTH TESTIFY IN NARRATIVE.

ALL PARTIES ARE SWORN INCLUDING WITNESS, AND TESTIFY IN NARRATIVE.
9:40 AM RECESS.

JPT MARY MCLAIN CALLED FOR A RECESS UNTIL 10:00 AM IN ORDER FOR APPELLANT AND RESPONDENT AND TO EXCHANGE INFORMATIONS. PICTURES AND FOLDER FROM BOTH SIDES SHOWN TO EACH OTHER.

10:05 CAUSE CALLED BY JPT MARY MCLAIN. BIVET BRACKETT TESTIFY IN NARRATIVE. EVIDENCE INTRODUCED.
EXHIBIT 1 - SEVERAL PAGES OF INVOICES FOR RENT, WATER, PG&E BILLS. (STAPLED)
EXHIBIT 2 - BLACK BINDER
EXHIBIT 3 - BLACK BINDER.

11:20 AM LORETTA WHITTLE TESTIFY IN NARRATIVE. WITNESS NEELE ROY TESTIFY IN NARRATIVE. NEW EXHIBITS INTRODUCED. ONE PHOTO ALBUM AND 6 FOLDERS. FOR CASE NOS. 823595 AND 823596.

11:45 AM MATTER SUBMITTED; CASE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Judgment Entered
